name: network-editor-web-monorepo
description: Packet Tracer style web network simulator using TypeScript React, Rust WebAssembly, Go, and PostgreSQL.

scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke:features && npm run smoke:cli && npm run smoke:python-cli && npm run smoke:python-http
scripts.check:web: npm run build && npm run smoke:all
scripts.check:all: npm run build && npm run build:rust && npm run build:go
